en-US.name: Safari TV Remote
en-US.summary: Control Safari playback on the TV Mac.
en-US.description: Controls Safari play, pause, rewind, forward, fullscreen, and exit fullscreen on the Mac connected to the TV.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask tv remote to pause
Alexa, ask tv remote to play
Alexa, ask tv remote to rewind ten seconds

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Open a Safari video on the TV Mac, then ask the skill to pause, play, rewind, forward, fullscreen, or exit fullscreen.
